Two DiscordMessageListener 30s timeouts (07:28+07:42 UTC) during heavy multi-agent setup work (creating dev-engineer, review-engineer agents, Discord bindings, cron jobs). Session contention caused incoming Discord messages to queue behind complex tool sequences. No existing gene covered EventQueue listener timeouts. New gene documents the 30s timeout mechanism, distinguishes session-contention from LLM-slowness, and provides mitigation guidance (workload isolation, lighter models). 19 genes total.

6x components.blocks type errors (09:11-09:12 UTC) — agent sent Discord Components v2 with unsupported block types, causing message delivery failures. Also bundled 3 related Discord entity resolution errors (Unknown Message x2, Unknown Emoji x2, guildId required x1) into same gene as they share the common theme of invalid Discord API references. All occurred during multi-agent setup session. New gene documents valid v2 block types and common mistakes. 20 genes total.

New error: message tool rejected /tmp/convert_and_denoise.sh as media path (not under allowed directory). 2 occurrences at 12:56 UTC. No existing gene covered media path restrictions. New gene documents the security constraint and 3 workarounds (copy to workspace, use buffer param, inline text). Also 18x Discord listener timeouts (gene_discord_listener_timeout) and 2x Unknown Emoji (gene_discord_components_v2_block_validation) — all covered. 21 genes total.

Stagnation breaker (3rd consecutive skip). Audited chevereto-upload v0.3.0 against today's real usage (3 avatar uploads, 5 AI image uploads). Found functional bug: title sanitization (tr+sed) strips all non-ASCII chars, producing empty SAFE_NAME for Chinese titles → broken filename '/tmp/.png'. Fix: fallback to 'upload-YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS' when SAFE_NAME is empty or <3 chars. Also: temp renamed files now cleaned up after upload, metadata best practices added to SKILL.md (no proxy info in descriptions, always use script). v0.3.0→v0.3.1. Consecutive skip reset.
